span.p: Section 140: Wearing the dress of a serviceman (eff: 1872-01-01)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Not being a serviceman in the Singapore Armed Forces or any visiting forces l...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Wears any garb or carries any token

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: The garb or token resembles any garb or token used by such a serviceman

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: With the intention that it may be believed that he is such a serviceman

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Imprisonment up to 6 months; Fine up to $2500.00
